data.body: 記事の要約: ASUSのスマートフォン「ROG Phone 9 FE」は、Snapdragon 8 Gen 3を搭載し、クーポン適用で約8.3万円で購入可能です。このモデルは、最大185HzのAMOLEDディスプレイとIP68の防水性能を備え、ゲーム性能と日常使いを両立しています。12GBのメモリによりマルチタスクもスムーズで、特に3Dゲームを快適に楽しむことができます。AliExpressでのセール期間中にクーポンを利用することで、賢く購入することが推奨されています。

Angiogram is scheduled! 🥳
I go in Monday morning for this procedure where they'll thread a catheter up through my arteries to the veins in my brain that they believe are too narrow. They'll shoot dye through these veins and watch what happens on an X-ray. We'll know same day if stenting will help.

data.body:
Enchanted Rock State Natural Area (Apr.23, 2023)
Enchanted Rock is the largest pink granite monadnock in the United States, located in the Llano Uplift about 17 miles (27 km) north of Fredericksburg, Texas. It rises around 425 feet (130 m) to an elevation of 1,825 feet (556 m) above sea level.

data.body:
The recap: they had a 6-lane highway bridge; decided they needed more capacity. 

Built a new 6-lane bridge (12 total) to add capacity 

Needed to pay for the new bridge, so they added a modest toll to both bridges

Traffic volumes fall precipitously to ~half of before,
